objects.description: Full PHP source code recovered from open-directory at 79.137.192.3 (Aeza Group, Moscow, AS216246).; BellaMain.zip (panel) was novel to VirusTotal at time of analysis (first public disclosure).; Hardcoded canary Telegram bot token 6797512084:AAGbJVoC* is REVOKED (Telegram returned 401 Unauthorized on getMe prior to publication). Token value retained as historical IOC for hunting on stored copies of older kit RARs.; All operator domains are 0/92 detection on VirusTotal as of 2026-05-07 — defenders should not rely on AV verdicts for this campaign.
